footer.tagline: Smart waste collection for Douala. Connecting households with collectors for a cleaner city.

home.heroDesc: KmerTrash connects households with reliable waste collectors. Schedule pickups, track in real-time, and help keep your community clean — all from your phone.
home.featuresSubheading: From scheduling to tracking to rating — KmerTrash handles it all so you can focus on what matters.
home.scheduleDesc: Book waste collection at your convenience. Choose your preferred date, time, and location.
home.trackingDesc: Track your assigned collector live on a map. Know exactly when they'll arrive.
home.collectorsDesc: Verified, rated collectors in your area. Every job includes proof of completion.
home.rateDesc: Rate your collector after each pickup. Help maintain high service quality.
home.secureDesc: Your data is encrypted and protected. We never share your personal information.
home.offlineDesc: Queue actions when offline, auto-sync when back online. Never miss a beat.
home.howSubheading: Get started in minutes. It's as easy as 1-2-3-4.
home.step1Desc: Get KmerTrash free on iOS or Android.
home.step2Desc: Choose your date, time, and location.
home.step4Desc: Verify completion and rate the service.
home.lovedSubheading: See what households and collectors are saying about KmerTrash.
home.quote1: KmerTrash changed how I manage waste at home. Scheduling is so easy, and I love tracking the collector!
home.quote2: As a collector, the app helps me manage my routes and earnings efficiently. Great tool!
home.quote3: Even when my internet goes down, I can still schedule pickups. The offline mode is a lifesaver.
home.ctaDesc: Join thousands of households already using KmerTrash for reliable, trackable waste collection.

download.metaDesc: Download the KmerTrash app for free on iOS and Android. Schedule waste pickups, track collectors in real-time, and keep Douala clean.
download.heroDesc: Download the free KmerTrash app and start scheduling waste pickups in Douala today. Available on both iOS and Android.
download.f3: Rate and review after each pickup
download.f4: Works offline — auto-syncs when back online
download.ctaDesc: Download KmerTrash now and schedule your first pickup in under a minute.

testimonials.metaDesc: See what households and collectors in Douala are saying about KmerTrash. Real reviews from real users.
testimonials.heading: What Our
testimonials.subheading: Real stories from households and collectors across Douala who use KmerTrash every day.
testimonials.t1: KmerTrash changed how I manage waste at home. Scheduling is so easy, and I love being able to track the collector on the map. No more waiting around all day!
testimonials.t2: As a collector, the app helps me manage my routes and earnings efficiently. I can see all my assigned jobs, navigate to locations, and get paid on time. Great tool!
testimonials.t3: Even when my internet goes down, I can still schedule pickups. The offline mode is a lifesaver in areas with spotty connection. Everything syncs perfectly when I'm back online.
testimonials.t4: I've been using KmerTrash for 6 months now. The collectors are always on time, and the proof-of-pickup photos give me peace of mind. Highly recommend!
testimonials.t5: The earnings tracking feature is amazing. I can see exactly how much I've earned each week and plan my schedule accordingly. The app has really improved my income.
testimonials.t6: What I love most is the rating system. It keeps collectors accountable and ensures quality service. My neighbourhood has never been cleaner since we started using KmerTrash.
testimonials.t7: The app is so simple to use. My mother, who isn't tech-savvy at all, was able to schedule her first pickup without any help. That says a lot about the design!
testimonials.t8: Before KmerTrash, finding consistent work was hard. Now I have a steady stream of jobs and can plan my day. The location tracking helps me find addresses quickly too.

about.metaDesc: Learn about the KmerTrash team and our mission to transform waste collection in Douala, Cameroon through technology.
about.heading: About
about.subheading: We're on a mission to make Douala cleaner, one pickup at a time.
about.storyP1: KmerTrash was born from a simple observation: Douala, Cameroon's economic capital, deserved a better waste collection system. Streets were littered, illegal dumping was rampant, and households had no reliable way to schedule pickups.
about.storyP2: We saw an opportunity to bridge the gap between households who needed waste collection and independent collectors looking for steady work. By leveraging mobile technology, we created a platform that makes waste collection as easy as ordering a ride.
about.storyP3: Today, KmerTrash serves thousands of households and hundreds of collectors across Douala, processing tens of thousands of pickups. But we're just getting started.
about.missionDesc: To provide every household in Douala with access to reliable, affordable, and trackable waste collection services through innovative mobile technology.
about.visionDesc: A cleaner, healthier Douala where waste is managed responsibly, collectors earn fair wages, and technology empowers communities to take control of their environment.
about.communityDesc: We build for the people of Douala. Every feature is designed to make waste collection easier and more accessible for everyone.
about.innovationDesc: We leverage mobile technology, real-time tracking, and offline capabilities to solve real-world waste management challenges.
about.sustainDesc: A cleaner Douala means a healthier planet. We're committed to reducing illegal dumping and promoting responsible waste disposal.
about.qualityDesc: Verified collectors, proof-of-completion photos, and user ratings ensure a high-quality, trustworthy service for all.
about.teamSubheading: A passionate group of innovators dedicated to making Douala cleaner.
about.member1Bio: Experienced in logistics and waste management operations across Central Africa. Ensures smooth collector onboarding.
about.member2Bio: Full-stack developer passionate about using technology to solve urban challenges in Cameroon. TechWomen Fellow.
about.member3Bio: Human-centered designer focused on creating intuitive mobile experiences for diverse user groups in Douala.

terms.metaDesc: Read the KmerTrash Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and usage guidelines for our waste collection platform.
terms.heading: Terms of
terms.summaryText: KmerTrash is a free platform connecting households with waste collectors in Douala. You must be 18+ to use the service. We collect minimal data needed to operate. You can delete your account anytime. Collectors are independent and not employees of KmerTrash. For the full legal terms, please read below.
terms.s1Text: By downloading, accessing, or using the KmerTrash mobile application ("App") or website ("Site"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, please do not use our services.
terms.s2Text: You must be at least 18 years old and a resident of Cameroon to create an account and use KmerTrash. By registering, you represent and warrant that you meet these requirements.
terms.s3Text: KmerTrash is a technology platform that connects households seeking waste collection services with independent waste collectors. We facilitate scheduling, tracking, and payment for waste collection jobs. KmerTrash does not itself collect waste and is not a waste collection company.
terms.s4a: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials.
terms.s4b: You must provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration.
terms.s4c: You may not create multiple accounts or share your account with others.
terms.s4d: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.
terms.s5Text: Household users may schedule waste collection jobs, track collectors, validate completed jobs, and rate service quality. Users agree to provide accurate location information and be available at the scheduled time for pickups.
terms.s6Text: Collectors are independent contractors and not employees of KmerTrash. Collectors must maintain appropriate equipment, follow safe waste handling practices, and provide proof of collection (photos) for every completed job.
terms.s7Text: We take your privacy seriously. KmerTrash collects only the data necessary to provide our services, including your name, phone number, location data, and job history. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
terms.s7a: Location data is used only for job scheduling and collector tracking.
terms.s7b: Authentication tokens are stored securely on your device.
terms.s7c: You may request deletion of your account and associated data at any time.
terms.s8Text: KmerTrash provides a platform to connect users and collectors. We are not liable for the quality of waste collection services, damages caused during collection, or disputes between users and collectors. Our maximum liability shall not exceed the fees paid through the platform in the preceding 12 months.
terms.s9Text: We may update these Terms from time to time. We will notify users of material changes through the App or via email. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.
terms.s10Text: For questions about these Terms, please contact us at

guides.heading: How-to
guides.subheading: Learn how to get the most out of KmerTrash with step-by-step guides and answers to common questions.
guides.faqSub: Can't find what you're looking for?
guides.g1s1: Download KmerTrash from the App Store or Google Play.
guides.g1s2: Open the app and tap 'Register' to create your account.
guides.g1s3: Enter your name, phone number, and create a password.
guides.g1s4: Select your role: Household or Collector.
guides.g1s5: You're ready to go! The home screen will show your dashboard.
guides.g2s1: From the Home screen, tap 'Schedule Pickup' or the '+' button.
guides.g2s2: Enter your pickup address or use your current location.
guides.g2s3: Choose your preferred date and time slot.
guides.g2s4: Add any notes for the collector (e.g., 'Gate code: 1234').
guides.g2s5: Tap 'Schedule' to confirm. You'll receive a confirmation.
guides.g3s1: Once a collector is assigned, you'll receive a notification.
guides.g3s2: Open the job detail screen to see the collector's name and rating.
guides.g3s3: When the collector starts the job, a live map view appears.
guides.g3s4: Track their real-time location as they approach your address.
guides.g3s5: You'll be notified when they arrive.
guides.g4s1: After collecting your waste, the collector takes a photo as proof.
guides.g4s2: The proof photo is uploaded and attached to your job.
guides.g4s3: You can view the proof photo in the Job Detail screen.
guides.g4s4: Tap 'Validate' to confirm the pickup was completed properly.
guides.g4s5: If there's an issue, you can report it or cancel validation.
guides.g5s1: After validating a completed job, you'll be prompted to rate.
guides.g5s2: Select a star rating from 1 (poor) to 5 (excellent).
guides.g5s3: Optionally add a comment about your experience.
guides.g5s4: Tap 'Submit Rating' to share your feedback.
guides.g5s5: Ratings help maintain quality across the platform.
guides.g6s1: KmerTrash works even without internet connection.
guides.g6s2: Schedule pickups, rate jobs, and complete actions while offline.
guides.g6s3: Actions are queued locally on your device.
guides.g6s4: When you're back online, everything syncs automatically.
guides.g6s5: A banner at the top shows your sync status and pending actions.
guides.faq1a: Yes! KmerTrash is completely free to download and use for households. Collectors also use the app for free — they earn money from completed collection jobs.
guides.faq2a: KmerTrash currently operates in Douala, Cameroon, covering major neighborhoods including Akwa, Bonabéri, Bonapriso, Deïdo, Bassa, Bonanjo, Makepe, and Ndokoti. We're expanding to new areas regularly.
guides.faq3q: What if my collector doesn't show up?
guides.faq3a: If your collector hasn't arrived within 30 minutes of the scheduled time, you can cancel the job and reschedule. The system will automatically reassign to another available collector. You can also contact support through the app.
guides.faq4q: How do I become a collector?
guides.faq4a: Download the app and register as a Collector. You'll need to provide identification and verify your phone number. Once approved, you'll start receiving job assignments in your area.
guides.faq5q: What types of waste can be collected?
guides.faq5a: KmerTrash handles general household waste, recyclables, and green waste. Hazardous materials (chemicals, medical waste, electronics) require special handling and are not currently supported through the app.
guides.faq6q: How does the rating system work?
guides.faq6a: After each completed pickup, households can rate their collector from 1 to 5 stars and leave a comment. Collectors with consistently high ratings get priority for new assignments. Ratings below 3 stars trigger a review process.
guides.faq7a: This feature is coming soon! Currently, each pickup needs to be scheduled individually. We're working on weekly and bi-weekly recurring pickup options.
guides.faq8q: What if I need to cancel a scheduled pickup?
guides.faq8a: You can cancel any pending or assigned pickup from the Job Detail screen. Cancellations made more than 2 hours before the scheduled time have no penalty. Late cancellations may affect your reliability score.
guides.faq9a: Collectors earn money for each completed job. Earnings are tracked in the app and can be viewed in the Earnings section. Payment processing and withdrawal options are being expanded.
guides.faq10a: Yes. We use industry-standard encryption for all data. Your location is only shared with your assigned collector during active jobs. We never sell your data. You can delete your account and all associated data at any time.

contact.heading: Get in
contact.subheading: Have a question, suggestion, or need support? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.infoDesc: Reach out through any of the channels below, or fill out the form and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.inAppDesc: For the fastest response, use the support chat directly in the KmerTrash app. Available 24/7 for active users.
contact.thankYou: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
